utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five sections. Step-by-step: (1) health_coverage: present, includes both physical and mental health components with costs and total cost, fully specified. (2) property_coverage: present, includes the plan name and cost, fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: present, identifies an adventure travel plan and costs, fully specified. (4) additional_services: present, though costs are not explicitly itemized, but description states they are included within main plans — this satisfies inclusion but not full specification of separate costs; since the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs', this is only partially specified. (5) total_budget: present, includes monthly and annual breakdown, fully specified. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified according to the format requirements.
